2603.16410.title: PlotTwist: A Creative Plot Generation Framework with Small Language Models
2603.16410.paper_summary: Creative plot generation presents a fundamental challenge for language models: transforming a concise premise into a coherent narrative that sustains global structure, character development, and emotional resonance. Although recent Large Language Models (LLMs) demonstrate strong fluency across general-purpose tasks, they typically require preference alignment to perform well on specialized domains such as creative plot generation. However, conducting such alignment at the scale of frontier LLMs is computationally prohibitive, significantly limiting accessibility and practical deployment. To address this, we present PlotTwist, a structured framework that enables Small Language Models (SLMs) with $\leq$ 5B active parameters to generate high-quality, premise-conditioned plots competitive with frontier systems up to $200\times$ larger. Our approach decomposes generation into three specialized components: (1) an Aspect Rating Reward Model trained via a novel Positive-Negative prompting strategy to deliver structured narratives across five Narrative Quality Dimensions (NQDs); (2) a Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) plot generator aligned via Direct Preference Optimization on high-confidence preference pairs; and (3) an Agentic Evaluation module that emulates human critical judgment for unbiased post-hoc assessment. Extensive experiments demonstrate that PlotTwist consistently outperforms frontier models across multiple NQDs despite substantially tighter capacity constraints. Further validation confirms strong sensitivity to narrative quality, as the framework reliably distinguishes plots derived from critically acclaimed versus widely panned screenplays. Together, these results establish structured, preference-based alignment as a resource-efficient approach to high-quality creative plot generation.
2603.16410.paper_summary_zh: 創意情節生成對語言模型提出了一個基本挑戰：將簡潔的前提轉化為一個連貫的敘事，維持全球結構、角色發展和情感共鳴。雖然最近的大型語言模型（LLMs）在通用任務上表現出強大的流暢性，但它們通常需要偏好對齊才能在專業領域如創意情節生成上表現良好。然而，在前沿LLMs的規模上進行這種對齊在計算上是不可行的，這大大限制了可及性和實際部署。為了解決這個問題，我們提出了PlotTwist，一個結構化框架，使得活躍參數不超過5B的小型語言模型（SLMs）能夠生成與前沿系統（最多大200倍）競爭的高品質、以前提為條件的情節。我們的方法將生成分解為三個專門的組件：（1）一個通過新穎的正負提示策略訓練的方面評分獎勵模型，能夠在五個敘事質量維度（NQDs）中提供結構化的敘事；（2）一個通過高置信度偏好對的直接偏好優化對齊的專家混合（MoE）情節生成器；以及（3）一個模擬人類批判性判斷的代理評估模塊，用於無偏的事後評估。廣泛的實驗表明，儘管容量限制顯著更緊，但PlotTwist在多個NQDs上持續超越前沿模型。進一步的驗證確認對敘事質量的強敏感性，因為該框架可靠地區分來自備受讚譽與廣受批評的劇本的情節。總體而言，這些結果確立了結構化的基於偏好的對齊作為一種資源高效的高品質創意情節生成方法。
2603.16410.author: Abhinav Thorat et.al.
2603.16410.authors: Abhinav Thorat, Ravi Kolla, Jyotin Goel, Niranjan Pedanekar
